ab: Laqi ku Sediq Balay ka yaku.
Wa mniq alang Toda ka sapah nami.
Niqan rima hiyi sediq ka knkana tnsapah nami.
en: There are five people in our family.

ab: Niqan turu hiyi tnswayi ka tnsapah nami.
ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: Msupu nami mniq sapah ka tama, bubu, qbsuran snaw, qbsuran qridin mi yaku.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: Reykun bay ka tama mu, keysacu ka tama mu.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: Mliwang bay ka bubu mu, ising ka bubu mu.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: Mniq sapah ka tama pa, mpprngaw nami kari Sediq ka yami.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the ethnic language with us at home.

ab: Sngayan rbawan pa hay musa nami alang kana ka yami.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: Musa nami msupu qmraq crayux ka yami dqbsuran mu.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.

ab: Qrasun mu bay ka tnsapah nami.
en: I like our family very much.
